since_last: 71% of 89 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.85%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 71% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.22% · BTC +2.01% · Gold +0.21% · Nasdaq100 -1.54%. 71% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.85%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.85%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -0.34%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AVAV is the standout at +4.62%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +4.62%, PLTR +4.00%, ADBE +2.37%, ADBE +2.37%, PWR +1.63%. Laggards: BIDU -4.09%, DELL -1.70%, BABA -1.48%, AMBA -1.47%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.06% at $159.21
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.06% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
